productDisplayName: Fila Men Mountainaire Olive Casual Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italys materials capital, Biella. This Mountainaire shoe from fila is an example of the brands excellent craftsmanship. The suede upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brands versatile power in innovation. These shoes are made for those treacherous trails you always wanted to trek. The powerful outsole and comfortably built inner and upper guarantee maximum comfort. Wear these with trekking shorts or cargo pants and a polo t-shirt. Upper Soft suede upper with mesh overlays and stitch detailing Reinforced synthetic leather overlay on the toe box for shock absorption Central lacing system for a customised Fit Padded tongue with branding for comfort Padded mesh lining Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPU outsole with aggressive multidirectional lugs on the forefoot and heel Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
